title: leontodon eriopodus
intro: Leontodon eriopodus, also known as the woolly hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues and reducing inflammation in the body. Leontodon eriopodus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists for its medicinal value.
